# Environments

This directory contains the Terraform IaC and Kubernetes manifests in environment-specific
directories.


## AWS Stuff
ECR Registry is in DEmo AWS Account, which uses SSO for people login.  The publishing is done via GHA with a dedicated IAM user.

- 218691292270.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/sedemo/beyond-k8s-lambda

## Kargo / Argo

- https://kargo.akpdemoapps.link/project/beyond-k8s
